title: thymus fallax var. jalpanensis
intro: Thymus fallax var. jalpanensis, also known as Jalpan thyme, is a variety of the Thymus fallax plant species, which is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Thymus fallax var. jalpanensis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
